text: shime'on peteros 'eved yeshu'a hamashicha ushelicho el-asher qibelu emuna yeqara keshelanu betsideqat eloheynu umoshi'enu yeshu'a hamashicha
chesed veshalom yiheyu lakhem lemakhebir beda'at haelohim veyeshu'a adoneynu
baasher gevurato haelohit natena lanu et kal-tsarekheynu lachayim velachasidut 'al-yedey da'at haqore otanu bikhevodo vecheylo
asher bahem natan-lanu havetachot gedolot meod viqarot lema'an tiqechu 'al-yadan cheleq beteva' elohim lehimalet mikileyon hataava asher ba'olam
ba'avur zot shiqedu lehosif 'al-emunatekhem et-ma'ase hatsedaqa ve'al ma'ase hatsedaqa et-hada'at
ve'al-hada'at et-haperishut ve'al-haperishut et-hasavelanut ve'al-hasavelanut et-hachasidut
ve'al-hachasidut et-haachava ve'al-haachava et-haahava
ki im-ele yimatseu veyirebu vakhem lo-yitenu etekhem liheyot mite'atselim uvetelim me'asot peri leda'at adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
ki haish asher eyn-ele lo 'iver hu refe 'eynayim veshakhecha et-tahorato mechatotayv harishonot
lakhen achay hosifu veshiqedu lechazeq et-qeriatekhem uvechiratekhem bema'asim tovim ki im ken ta'aso lo tikashelu
ki-khen yipatach lifeneykhem larevacha mevo malekhut 'olam asher laadoneynu umoshi'enu yeshu'a hamashicha
'al-ken lo echedal lehazekirekhem 'al-ele bekhal-'et af-ki yeda'etem et-amitenu zu vehitekonanetem bah
venakhon be'eynay lehazekir uleha'ir etekhem kal-yemey heyoti bamishekan haze
mida'eti ki maher ye'etaq mishekani vekhen gilah-li adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
veesheqod liheyot lakhem tamid zikheron hadevarim haele gam-acharey fetirati
ki lo halakhenu acharey hagadot mechukamot behodi'enu etekhem gevurat adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha uvoo ki 'eyneynu hayu haroot et-gedulato
ki nasa yeqar vekhavod meet elohim haav kevo elayv qol milifeney haderat kevodo lemor ze beni yedidi ratseta nafeshi bo
veet-haqol hahu shama'enu veazeneynu yotse min-hashamayim biheyotenu 'imo behar haqodesh
udevar hanevua yoter qayam itanu vahativotem 'asot asher shatem libekhem elayv kener meir bimeqom ofel 'ad-ki yibaqa' or hayom vezarach kokhav hanogah bilevavekhem
vezot tede'u rishona asher kal-nevuat hamiqera eynena kefi fiteron adam milibo
ki me'olam lo-yatsea nevua biretson haadam ki aneshey elohim haqedoshim diberu kaasher nesaam rucha haqodesh
vegam-neviey sheqer hayu va'am kaasher yiheyu morey sheqer gam-bakhem asher yakhenisu kitot mashechitot vikhachashu bamoshel asher qanam veyaviu 'al-nafesham kilayon piteom
verabim yelekhu acharey to'avotam uva'avuram yutan derekh haemet legidufim
uvediverey viduy ya'aso etekhem lemisechar lahem lema'an betso'a batsa' asher mishepatam meaz lo yitemahemah veshiveram lo yanum
ki lo-chas elohim 'al-hamaleakhim asher chateu ki im-horidam leqitsevey harim vayasegirem bekhaveley ofel leshameram lamishepat
vegam-'al-hadorot harishonim lo chas vayishemor raq et-nocha qore hatsedeq veshive'a 'imo bahavio et-hamabul 'al-dor haresha'im
veet-'arey sedom va'amora hafakh laefer vedanam bemahepekha vayesimem lemashal laasher 'atidim la'asot zima
vayatsel et-lot hatsadiq asher heleuhu aneshey veliya'al hahem bedarekhey zimatam
ki hatsadiq haze yashav betokham vehu roe otam veshome'a venafesho hayeshara 'aguma 'alayv yom vayom bema'asey rishe'am
ki yode'a yeho lehatsil et-chasidayv minisayon velachaskh et-haresha'im leyom hamishepat lehashiv gemulam lahem
uveyoter et-haholekhim acharey habasar betaaot tevel uvozim et-hamemeshala 'azey fanim holekhim bisherirut libam velo yecheredu mecharef et-haserarot
asher af-hamaleakhim hagedolim mehem be'oz vakhocha lo yegadefum lifeney yeho bemishepatam
veele kabehemot hasekhalot hanoladot kechaq-tive'am lalekhed velashachat becherefam et-asher lo yade'u yishachatu behashechit nafesham ugemul 'avelatam yisau
asher 'edenat yomam le'oneg yacheshovu megoalim umezuhamim hamitepaneqim bemaduchey nafesham veokhelim veshotim 'imakhem
'eynayim lahem meleot niufim velo tiseba'ena lachato veet-nafeshot hapetaim yetsodedu velev melumad-betsa' lahem beney hameera
et-haderekh hayashar 'azevu vayite'u vayelekhu bederekh bile'am ben-be'or asher ahev sekhar ha'avela
vatehi-lo tokhachat 'al-chatato ki habehema hailemet dibera veqol-adam vata'etsor beivelet haqosem
beerot beli-mayim hema 'avim nidafim bise'ara asher shamur lahem choshekh-afela le'olam
ki bedaberam begeut diverey shave yatsudu betaaot habasar 'al-yedey zimatam et asher akhe-nimeletu midey haholekhim bederekh to'a
chufesha yavetichu lahem vehem be'atsemam 'avadim lashachat ki 'eved haadam lekhovesho
ki acharey himaletam mitumeot ha'olam beda'at adoneynu umoshi'enu yeshu'a hamashicha im-shavu vehatebe'u vetokhan venikhebashu acharitam tiheye ra'a mereshitam
nocha lahem shel lada'at et-derekh hatsedaqa measher yeda'uhu venasogu achor min-hamitseva haqedosha hamesura lahem
veqara lahem kaasher yomar meshal haemet hakelev shav 'al-qeo vehachazir 'ole min-harachetsa lehitegolel barafesh
zot haigeret hashenit asher ani khotev aleykhem chavivay uvisheteyhen kemazekir a'ir et-tumat levavekhem
lizekor et-hadevarim haneemarim miqedem bidey haneviim haqedoshim veet-mitsevat adoneynu umoshi'enu asher nitena 'al-yedey shelicheykhem
ude'u zot lakhem rishona ki beacharit hayamim yavou letsim holekhim acharey taaot nafesham veyitelotsatsu lemor
aye havetachat boo ki meaz shakhevu haavot hakol 'omed kemo mereshit haberia
vene'elam mida'etam liretsonam shelefanim bidevar elohim na'aso hashamayim vehaarets min-hamayim ve'al-yedey hamayim
ve'al yedeyhem aveda tevel asher meaz ki nishetefa bemey hamabul
gam-hashamayim vehaarets asher lefaneynu nitsepenu videvaro vehem shemurim laesh leyom hadin vaavod aneshey haresha'
vezot haachat al-te'alem mikem chavivay sheyom echad keelef shanim be'eyney yeho veelef shanim keyom echad
velo-yeacher yeho et-asher hiveticha kaasher-yesh choshevim zot leichur ki maarikh apo ba'avurenu velo yachepots baavod haovedim ki im-bifenot kulam lateshuva
bo yavo yom-yeho keganav balayela az hashamayim beshaon yachalofu vehayesodot yevo'aru vehitemogagu vehaarets vehama'asim asher 'aleyha yisarefu
ve'ata im-kal-ele yamugu mah-meod 'aleykhem lehitehalekh biqedusha uvachasidut
ulechakot leyom-yeho sheyavo ulehachish oto asher bo hashamayim yamugu vaesh vehayesodot yevo'aru venamasu
vaanachenu kefi havetachato mechakim leshamayim chadashim uleerets chadasha asher-tsedeq yalin bam
'al-ken chavivay hamechakim laele shiqedu lehimatse lefanayv beshalom neqiyim vezakim mipasha'
veet-orekh rucha adoneynu tacheshevu liteshu'a kaasher gam-achinu haahuv polos katav aleykhem kefi hachakhema hanetuna lo
vekhen bekhal-igerotayv bedabero-sham 'al-ele uvahen yesh devarim qashim mehavin vehabo'arim vehapetaim yahafekhu otam kaasher gam-ya'aso beyeter hasefarim leavedan nafesham
veatem chavivay asher yeda'etem zot merosh hishameru lenafeshoteykhem pen-timashekhu acharey ta'ut aneshey veliya'al unefaletem mima'uzekhem
urevu bechesed uveda'at adoneynu umoshi'enu yeshu'a hamashicha asher-lo hakavod gam-hayom vegam-leyom ha'olam amen ﻿
